content.question: Are discriminatory misclassification patterns specific to Roma children (as documented by ECtHR and UN reports) statistically distinguishable from general over-identification trends, and what are the demographic and geographic overlaps between high-SEN-identification zones and majority-Roma school catchment areas?
content.reduction_path: Obtain ethnically-disaggregated SNI identification data (by child ethnicity, school majority composition, and expert-committee source) for the 2012/13–2023/24 period; analyze whether Roma-specific and general identification trends are correlated, divergent, or driven by different mechanisms; map school-choice/catchment-area effects on composition and SEN classification patterns.
